_readme.what: Single source of truth for the print shop. prints.html renders from this. Replaces the print blocks that were hardcoded in prints.html and the print half of collections.json.
_readme.supersedes: collections.json's checkout note (GoDaddy Payments) is STALE. Checkout is Shopify Buy Button on corraoelena.com as of the 2026-07-16 pivot. collections.json now governs POSTCARDS ONLY, which are deferred to September.
_readme.sorting: Place-sorted. `place` drives the filter chips and the grouping. Story lives on every card via `article`, but never drives the sort.
_readme.how-to-add-a-print: Append to `prints` with: slug, name, img, alt, place, article (real journal page or null), line (the one-line hook), tier ('open' or 'vanishing'), and sizes[] (omit to inherit the default ladder).
_readme.the-rule: A print does NOT ship without a true story. `article` must point at a real journal entry. No article, no listing. See Journal/Threshold/00-bridge-print-buyer.md.
_readme.no-overlap: Elena, 2026-07-19: anything in the vanishing tier is NEVER in the open tier. Enforced by `tier`, not by convention.
_readme.working-titles: Names in [brackets] are Penny working titles awaiting Elena's rename pass.
_readme.buyUrl: null until the Shopify Buy Button variant IDs exist. Null renders the card as browsable but not buyable, with the coming-soon state.
_readme.poster-series: 10 self-portrait poster designs from one Canva doc (DAHP5qbRkYs). PRINT MASTERS live in _intake/'Eleanora Self Portrait Poster Designs Large ' at 5400x7200 = a true 18x24 at 300dpi. Design 10 also has a native 24x36 master (11.png, 7200x10800). Design 8 must use 8-rotated-ccw90.png (7200x5400, landscape). Verified 2026-07-20 by inspecting pixels at 100%: real resolved detail, not upscaled. Web JPEGs in img/posters/ are derived from these masters. Names are still [placeholders] and every entry has article:null, so nothing may list yet.
_readme.holding-names: Names set 2026-07-20 via /eleanora-voice against the naming SOP. These are HOLDING names (SOP: orphans get a light holding name, upgraded when a story adopts them). Designs 1, 6, 7 and 9 are flagged 'needs Elena's moment-feeling' because the SOP forbids guessing the shutter-moment feeling that makes a real hero name. `slugFinal` is the slug to adopt once names are confirmed; `slug` stays poster-N until the Canva re-export lands with named pages.
_readme.costs: Landed costs and vendor/provider IDs moved OUT of this file 2026-07-20: this repo is PUBLIC. They live in 1-Clients/Eleanora/offers/prints/print-costs-PRIVATE.json in the main repo. The site only needs `price`.

ladder._note: Prices LOCKED by Elena 2026-07-19. Landed cost = Printify product + US shipping, Archival Matte. Shipping is built into the price (free shipping at checkout).
ladder.OPEN-QUESTION-L: 24x36 at true 300dpi needs 7247x10847px. Elena's best camera files are 5712x4284. L cannot clear her own 300dpi rule. Awaiting her call: drop L to 12x18, accept ~150dpi at 24x36 (standard for large wall art), or AI upscale. NOTHING SHIPS AT L UNTIL SHE DECIDES.
ladder.multi-buy: Additional items ship at $1.99 vs $6.99 first. A 2nd 5x7 in the same order lands at $5.94. Set/bundle pricing flagged to Elena, not built.
ladder.RESOLVED-2026-07-20: The 18x24 masters yield 1028 dpi at 5x7 and 491 dpi at 11x14, so S and M clear the 300dpi rule with room to spare. L 24x36 lands at 200 dpi from an 18x24 file and FAILS for 9 of 10 designs; only design 10 has a native 24x36, and even that is 7200x10800 against the required 7247x10847, 0.65% short. Printify's targets are print size + 0.16in of bleed, so a Canva canvas set to 24.16 x 36.16 in exported at max would clear L exactly. Elena's call: redesign each poster on a 2:3 canvas for L, or ship S and M only. Note 3:4 art does not fit any ladder size without a crop.
ladder.L-24x36-MEASURED-2026-07-20: Design 10's 24x36 master (11.png, 7200x10800) was made by resizing the Canva canvas, not by re-rendering. Measured: stipple texture period grew 1.43x while the file grew 1.33x, so the art was enlarged. True detail behind it is ~225 dpi, not 300. ACCEPTABLE at 24x36 (wall art is normally 150-200 dpi; viewing distance scales with size) but it does not literally meet the 300dpi rule. Resizing the canvas will never recover detail; only higher-res source art will. Also 7200x10800 is 0.65% under Printify's 7247x10847 because they want 0.16in of bleed: set the Canva canvas to 24.16 x 36.16 in to clear it exactly.

prints.name: Island at Sea
prints.alt: A small island sitting alone in open water off the Croatian coast
prints.line: What if this picture reminded you, every day, that the leap into open water was the point?

prints.name: The Flower Door
prints.alt: A doorway in Italy framed by climbing flowers
prints.articleTitle: The Thing We Keep Running From
prints.line: What if this picture reminded you, every day, to let your life bloom in the place you already are?

prints.name: [working title — the portal]
prints.alt: An old doorway in Athens, worn stone and shadow
prints.articleTitle: I Think I've Been Collecting Portals
prints.line: What if this picture reminded you, every day, that every old door is an invitation?

prints.name: The Canvas
prints.alt: Eleanora in an open fur coat, black and white
prints.articleTitle: The Good Girl (who was already gone)
prints.line: Make my dreams come true. Put a little of my art on your wall.

prints.name: [working title — the girl you can't place]
prints.alt: Eleanora in black and white, a feather at her shoulder and soft smoke curling
prints.articleTitle: The Girl Behind the Camera (but also in front)
prints.line: What if this picture reminded you, every day, that you've always been someone worth becoming?
